title: ColorControlPointMapGraphNodeProperty Object
description: A property value that defines a complex mapping curve from an input domain of double values to an output range of color values. The mapping is represented by a set of points ordered by their domain value parameters. For a given input value, the output value is interpolated from the values of the two points before and after it using the specified interpolation function for each point.

methods.name: addPoint
methods.description: Add a point to the map.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Remove all points from the map.

methods.name: removePoint
methods.description: Remove a point from the map.

properties.name: description
properties.description: Returns the description of this property. This description is localized and can change based on the current language.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Gets the internal name of the property.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

addPoint.title: ColorControlPointMapGraphNodeProperty.addPoint Method
addPoint.description: Add a point to the map.

parameters.name: parameter
parameters.description: Where in the input domain where the point lies.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The color value of the parameter in the output domain.

parameters.name: interpolator
parameters.description: The function used to interpolate an output value for a input parameter between this point and the next.

classType.title: ColorControlPointMapGraphNodeProperty.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

clear.title: ColorControlPointMapGraphNodeProperty.clear Method
clear.description: Remove all points from the map.

getPoint.title: ColorControlPointMapGraphNodeProperty.getPoint Method
getPoint.return_description: The control point at this index.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Index of the point to get.

removePoint.title: ColorControlPointMapGraphNodeProperty.removePoint Method
removePoint.description: Remove a point from the map.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Index of the point to remove.
